JournalEntry.title: Journal Entry
JournalEntry.description: A single entry in the user's knowledge journal.

notes.description: The main content or notes of the entry.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the entry.

imageUrls.description: URLs of images attached to the entry.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this entry.

createdAt.description: The time the entry was created.

updatedAt.description: The time the entry was last updated.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Public profile information for the user.
